title: Junior Frontend Developer at Cognizant Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Cognizant Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Cognizant Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cognizant Digital Technologies:
Cognizant Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant Digital Technologies!
